title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Delhi University Act, 1922. (2) It shall come into force on such1 date as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, direct.
footnote: 1. 1st May, 1922, see Gen. R. & O., Vol. V, p. 49; Gazette of India, 1922, Pt. I, p. 384.
